branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Structural / loop-class closure repository default fallback

description: Allowed topology factors (n, g, s) used by the deterministic loop-class mapping algorithm. Each observable maps to a unique loop class as a function of (n, g, s) plus the +/- sign from the CP/T eigenparity (T-parity from the bounce-saddle source axiom, CP-parity from standard SM eigenparity).

physical_meaning.0: No spinor trace (pure boson, e.g. eps^2 only)

g_generation_range.comment: g=1 (single-generation) was reserved in earlier drafts but is unused in the current mapping algorithm; removed for consistency with manuscript.

physical_meaning.eps^2*gamma: Pure-Sync x Yukawa-Damping compound (Goldstone bilinear x carrier-defect damping)

mapping_algorithm_table.name: Pure-Sync x Yukawa-Damping
mapping_algorithm_table.comment: Compound (Pure-Sync amplitude eps^2_sync) x (Yukawa-Damping bare coefficient gamma). Under R-relation eps^2_sync = gamma/2 (C3 fluctuation-dissipation symmetry) the compound simplifies algebraically to gamma^2/2 = 1/200, parameter-free. Owner of O28 (Lambda_s_cosm_tensor); promotion approved with this release.

sign_convention.rule: + sign for CP-/T-even observables; - sign for CP-/T-odd observables
sign_convention.T_parity_source: T-parity source axiom on bounce negative mode
